# Implementation Plan: Polls Platform

**Branch**: `001-polls-platform` | **Date**: 2026-05-08 | **Spec**: [spec.md](./spec.md)
**Input**: Feature specification from `specs/001-polls-platform/spec.md`

**Note**: This plan was generated by the `/speckit-plan` command.

---

## Summary

The Polls Platform is a full-stack survey/polling web application. The **backend is complete** — all API endpoints for poll CRUD, response submission, analytics, CSV export, authentication, and admin management are implemented in NestJS with PostgreSQL via Prisma.

The **primary implementation gap is the frontend**:
1. The public poll-taking page at `/{slug}` does not exist (the most critical missing piece — FR-001 through FR-006).
2. The `/dashboard` poll management UI is a placeholder ("Poll management coming soon") — needs full CRUD UI (FR-027).
3. The analytics page for poll owners does not exist (FR-015, FR-016).

All three gaps are pure frontend work using the existing React 19 + Vite + TanStack Query + Zustand + react-hook-form + Zod + Recharts stack.

---

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: TypeScript 5.x — both `backend/` (NestJS 10, Node.js ≥20) and `frontend/` (React 19, Vite 5)
**Primary Dependencies**:
- Backend: NestJS 10, Prisma 5, `passport-jwt`, `class-validator`, `@nestjs/swagger`, `@nestjs/throttler`, `csv-stringify`
- Frontend: React 19, React Router 7, TanStack Query 5, Zustand, Zod, react-hook-form, Tailwind CSS 3, Recharts, Axios

**Storage**: PostgreSQL 16 — schema owned by `backend/prisma/schema.prisma`; all changes via `prisma migrate`
**Testing**:
- Backend: Jest (unit, co-located `*.spec.ts`) + supertest (E2E under `backend/test/`)
- Frontend: Vitest + Testing Library (unit, `__tests__/`) + Playwright (E2E, `frontend/e2e/`)

**Target Platform**: Web (desktop + mobile-responsive); Docker-composed for local dev and production
**Project Type**: Full-stack web application (monorepo, npm workspaces)
**Performance Goals**:
- Analytics load ≤3s for polls with up to 10,000 responses (SC-004)
- CSV export ≤5s for 10,000 responses (SC-006)
- Session restore ≤1s on page reload (SC-007)
- Rate limit rejection ≤100ms (SC-010)

**Constraints**:
- No schema changes — backend data model is complete and migration is applied
- No new top-level dependencies without retiring an existing one (constitution)
- All TypeScript — `any`, `as unknown as`, `@ts-ignore` require inline justification
- API stays within `/api/v1` — no breaking changes to existing endpoints

**Scale/Scope**: Single-tenant; ~10k responses per poll; ~100 users for admin bulk ops

---

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Must pass before Phase 0 research. Re-checked after Phase 1 design.*

### Principle I — Type Safety End-to-End ✅

- All new frontend code is TypeScript. No `any` without justification.
- Frontend form/API data validated via Zod schemas (poll creation form, response submission form).
- Backend DTOs already use `class-validator` — no changes needed.
- `npm run check:ts` must pass before merge.

### Principle II — Test Discipline & Green CI ✅

Coverage plan:
- **Vitest unit tests**: `PollPage`, `DashboardPage` (poll management), `PollAnalyticsPage`, `frontend/src/api/polls.ts`
- **Playwright E2E**: poll submission flow (anonymous + authenticated), dashboard poll CRUD, analytics page
- **Backend**: no new tests needed (backend is complete and already tested)
- CI must be green before merge — no `it.skip` left in `main`

### Principle III — Schema-First Data Modeling ✅

- No schema changes required. The existing `schema.prisma` covers all entities.
- If any schema change were needed, it would go through `prisma migrate dev` with a migration file.

### Principle IV — Versioned REST API with Documented Contract ✅

- All new frontend API calls consume existing `/api/v1` endpoints — no new endpoints needed.
- Contract documented in [`specs/001-polls-platform/contracts/api.md`](./contracts/api.md).
- No backward-incompatible changes to existing endpoints.

### Principle V — Security by Default ✅

- Poll-taking page (`/{slug}`) uses `OptionalJwtGuard` — anonymous access allowed, authenticated users get dedup.
- Private poll access token validated server-side on every submission.
- Rate limiting already wired via `@nestjs/throttler` on the submission endpoint.
- No secrets hardcoded in frontend source.
- Cookie deduplication uses `SameSite=Lax` — no CSRF risk for the cookie itself.

**Gate result**: PASS — no violations. No Complexity Tracking entries required.

## Project Structure

### Documentation (this feature)

```text
specs/001-polls-platform/
├── plan.md              # This file (/speckit-plan command output)
├── spec.md              # Feature specification
├── research.md          # Phase 0 output — all unknowns resolved
├── data-model.md        # Phase 1 output — entity catalogue + ERD + TS types
├── quickstart.md        # Phase 1 output — local dev, test, CI guide
├── contracts/
│   └── api.md           # Phase 1 output — full REST API contract
└── tasks.md             # Phase 2 output (/speckit-tasks command — NOT created by /speckit-plan)
```

### Source Code (repository root)

```text
backend/                          # NestJS — COMPLETE, no changes needed
├── prisma/
│   ├── schema.prisma             # Canonical data model (all entities defined)
│   ├── seed.ts                   # Demo data seeder
│   └── migrations/               # Applied migration: 20260503132014_init
├── src/
│   ├── auth/                     # JWT auth, refresh token rotation
│   ├── polls/                    # Poll CRUD, slug generation, access token
│   ├── questions/                # Question/option replace operation
│   ├── responses/                # Response submission, deduplication, validation
│   ├── analytics/                # Analytics aggregation, CSV export
│   ├── admin/                    # Admin user/poll management
│   ├── users/                    # User service
│   └── common/                   # Pagination, slugify, guards, decorators
└── test/
    └── app.e2e-spec.ts           # Supertest E2E tests

frontend/                         # React 19 — PRIMARY IMPLEMENTATION TARGET
├── src/
│   ├── api/
│   │   ├── client.ts             # Axios instance with JWT interceptors (exists)
│   │   ├── auth.ts               # Auth API calls (exists)
│   │   ├── admin.ts              # Admin API calls (exists)
│   │   └── polls.ts              # Poll + response + analytics API calls (TO CREATE)
│   ├── pages/
│   │   ├── PollPage.tsx          # Public poll-taking page /{slug} (TO CREATE)
│   │   ├── DashboardPage.tsx     # Poll management UI — replace placeholder (TO REPLACE)
│   │   └── PollAnalyticsPage.tsx # Analytics page /dashboard/polls/:slug/analytics (TO CREATE)
│   ├── components/
│   │   └── polls/                # Poll form, question builder, response form (TO CREATE)
│   ├── types/
│   │   ├── poll.ts               # Poll, Question, Option, PollDetail types (exists, extend)
│   │   └── analytics.ts          # Analytics types (exists, verify/extend)
│   ├── router.tsx                # Add /:slug and /dashboard/polls/:slug/analytics routes
│   └── store/
│       └── authStore.ts          # Zustand auth store (exists)
└── e2e/
    ├── poll-taking.e2e.ts        # Playwright: anonymous + auth submission (TO CREATE)
    ├── dashboard-polls.e2e.ts    # Playwright: poll CRUD from dashboard (TO CREATE)
    └── analytics.e2e.ts          # Playwright: analytics page (TO CREATE)
```

**Structure Decision**: Web application (Option 2). The monorepo has `backend/` and `frontend/` as npm workspaces. Backend is complete. All new source files are in `frontend/src/`. New Playwright specs go in `frontend/e2e/`.
